scripts.android:init: tauri android init && node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs
scripts.android:dev: node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs && node ./scripts/run-with-build-target.mjs android tauri android dev --target aarch64
scripts.android:build: node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs && node ./scripts/run-with-build-target.mjs android tauri android build --target aarch64 --apk
scripts.build:web: npm run typecheck && node ./scripts/run-vite-with-build-target.mjs build web
scripts.build:ext: npm run typecheck && vite build --config vite.extension.config.ts
scripts.build:web:tauri: npm run typecheck && node ./scripts/run-vite-with-build-target.mjs build desktop
